message: Use `text(...)` instead of a raw string in virtual-dom arrays.
`childCount` declares more children than this static virtual-dom array contains.
Use `VirtualDomElements.*` instead of a raw element type number.
Use `AriaRoles.*` instead of a raw role string.
Use an ARIA boolean constant instead of a raw string.
Use `TabIndex.*` instead of a raw tabIndex number.
Use a registered event listener id instead of an inline event handler.
Avoid object, array, or function attribute values because virtual-dom diffing compares attributes by reference.
Omit `className` instead of using an empty string.
Use class names or generated CSS instead of inline `style`.
Avoid object, array, or function attribute values because virtual-dom diffing compares attributes by reference.
Add an explicit `role` to clickable virtual-dom div nodes.
Omit empty ARIA attributes instead of using an empty string.
